question_text: Does your organization have a documented MFA policy that covers administrative and privileged accounts?
Describe your user provisioning and deprovisioning process including timelines for access revocation.
What SIEM platform do you use and what data sources are ingested?
When was your most recent penetration test and what firm conducted it?
Describe your change management process including peer review and deployment controls.
What is your documented uptime SLA and how is downtime measured?
Describe your disaster recovery plan including RTO and RPO targets.
How is customer data encrypted in transit and at rest?
What data classification tiers does your organization use?
Describe your annual security awareness training program and completion rate.
